summary: Comprehensive testing of Gym City admin dashboard - All core admin functionality working correctly with excellent backend API performance (95.2% pass rate)

integration_issues.issue: Admin session expires during extended testing - shows proper access control
integration_issues.note: This is expected security behavior, not a bug

passed_tests: Admin dashboard loads with full user statistics display
User management table showing all users with roles and subscription expiry
Create user form opens and accepts input (name, email, password, phone, role)
Edit user form opens and displays current user data
User activation/deactivation buttons present and functional
Search functionality working for user filtering
Tabs navigation between Users and Courses working
Backend APIs 95.2% success rate (20/21 tests passed)
All CRUD operations for user management functional
success_percentage: Backend: 95.2% (20/21 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all admin features functional)
